goal: Add Vitest-based tests for runLoop, EpisodeLogger, and Replay, with CI integration.
constraints: Use pnpm as the package manager
Keep implementation minimal while ensuring testability

acceptance.then: tests covering runLoop, EpisodeLogger, Replay pass

steps.expect: Understand current files and missing modules

input.cmd: Initialize pnpm project with ESM JavaScript and local Vitest runner
Implement minimal core modules (runLoop, EpisodeLogger, Replay)
Create tests/ directory with vitest specs covering required modules
Add CI workflow to run pnpm test

risks: Implementations might deviate from future design expectations
CI configuration may need adjustment without existing infrastructure
rollback: Remove new files and dependencies if approach invalid
Revert CI workflow if conflicts arise
